articles.title: Welcome to girl croosh!

articles.contents:
Welcome to girl croosh!

Hi twins! were girl croosh, the very real and original news website!
this is the first everr article so were still figuring things out, make sure to bookmark us to see whats next!

so until next time, thanks for reading,
and thats the croosh! <3
